title: labichea diversifolia var. lanceolata
intro: Labichea diversifolia var. lanceolata, also known as the lanceolate labichea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to tropical regions, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The lanceolate labichea has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat infections. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion for its health benefits, and has been used to treat a range of ailments including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
